note: Legacy raw fontSize/padding/borderRadius literals under src/features. Phase 2 baseline was 507; Phase 3 (Today screen rebuild) migrated TodayScreen/SpeedDialFAB onto src/components/ui/* primitives, lowering it to 499. Phase 4/B1 (Assets screen migration) migrated AssetsScreen/AccountForm/AssetForm onto src/components/ui/* primitives (Row, StatTile, Amount, SectionHeader, and a new shared Badge for AUTO/PRICE STALE), lowering it to 465. Phase 4/B2 (Budget screen migration) migrated BudgetScreen, weekly/SafeToSpendScreen, weekly/GaugeCard, weekly/Waterfall, weekly/DayDots, monthly/MonthlyScreen, and yearly/YearlyScreen onto src/components/ui/* primitives, lowering it to 389. Phase 4/B3 (Report screen migration) migrated ReportScreen, HomeScreen, and NWChart onto src/components/ui/* primitives, and added the F4 per-category spend breakdown, lowering it to 352. Phase 4/B4 (More + Decide migration) migrated MoreScreen, AllowanceEditor, RecurringRegister, PinSetup, AssumptionsEditor, RestoreBackup, CategoryManager, ImportPromptSheet, HouseholdSheet, DecideScreen, SpendingLens, IncomeLog, and Milestones onto src/components/ui/* primitives, and lightly tokenized ReconcileConfirmScreen.tsx while fixing S2, lowering it to 227. Phase 4/B5 (Chat/Manager migration) migrated ChatScreen, SessionList, ModelPicker, and SkillPicker onto src/components/ui/* primitives (Row for session/model/skill rows, Card for the confirm-changes and error panels, Screen for the two static pre-conversation states, Badge for model cost-tier tags) and tokenized the surrounding chat chrome, while deliberately leaving the message-bubble shape, the sticky header/input-bar icon-button dimensions, and the emoji glyph set hand-styled (own scroll/input-bar layout — see ChatScreen.tsx's inline notes); also added the M1 hand-rolled markdown renderer, the M2 default-model/human-label fix, and the M3 More-screen import-path demote. Lowered it to 146. Phase 4/B6 (Onboarding migration) migrated OnboardingWizard.tsx onto var(--text-*)/var(--space-*) tokens (StepHeader, step content, buttons) and added the shared Badge for the quick-setup choice card, eliminating every raw literal in that file (14 findings), and added the O2 quick-setup/full-setup branch (name + first account only, deferring income/pipe/allowance) using the same tokenized idiom throughout. Lowers it to 132. This count should only go down. See scripts/check-style-tokens.mjs.
